evidence_for: AUTHORITY.md band_table (top-of-range band), identifiers_available (explicit SP owner code, option asset), who_files claims

source.note_on_provenance: Fetched fresh by the sampler role (MANIFEST.json case 'sp_owner_options'); re-derived independently here (pdftotext -layout) for the survey, sha256 cross-checked against the manifest pin.

verification.observed: Filing ID #20034836 (Hon. Nancy Pelosi, CA11), 2 purchase rows, both explicit Owner column value 'SP' (row-level, no vehicle needed for this owner code — contrast with the 'multi_row_sp_vehicle' fixture's vehicle-only expression of SP). Amount bands OBSERVED: '$1,000,001 - $5,000,000' and '$500,001 - $1,000,000' — the highest band observed across all sampled fixtures/sample PDFs in this task. Asset descriptions carry a trailing [OP] (options) asset-type code, e.g. 'Intel Corporation - Common Stock (INTC) [OP]', with a 'D :' description sub-line giving strike price/expiration detail. Status: Member; identifiers again limited to Name + State/District, no bioguide id; instrument identified by name + ticker + [XX] code only.

politeness.incidents: none — re-read of an already-fetched, sha-verified fixture
